user.title: User
user.description: A user of the Beanibase platform.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

cushionFluffiness.description: A score representing the user's progress.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

uid.description: The ID of the user who checked in.

coachId.description: The ID of the coach persona interacted with.

reflection.description: The user's reflection or notes from the session.

conversation.title: Conversation

summary.description: A brief summary of the session for future context.
